{'sql': "SELECT DISTINCT s.Major, s.Age
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);"}

final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Major, s.Age
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);
final.answer_text: There are 21 unique combinations of major and age for students who do not have a cat as a pet. The youngest age among them is 18, and the oldest is 26.
